SELECT
  T1.Segment
FROM "yearmonth" AS T1
INNER JOIN customers AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
GROUP BY
  T1.Segment
HAVING
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN 1
    WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN 2
  END,
  ABS((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
